news.paragraph: Taiwan Semiconductor has seen a 33% year-to-date gain, driven by its prominent role in the artificial intelligence sector. Traders should consider the potential for valuation risks and a recent 34.29% stake reduction by First Eagle Investment when evaluating the stock. No imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are explicitly noted in the current news cycle.
